overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a morning walk through a neon-accented urban commercial district. The player character moves from a restaurant sidewalk with outdoor seating, across a parking lot, through an intersection dominated by a large CHOOH2 fuel sign, and toward a gas station. The environment features bright sunlight, scattered pedestrians, and futuristic vehicles.

events.description: passing close to an NPC sitting at an outdoor table under purple umbrella
exiting the covered sidewalk and entering the open parking lot area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the restaurant sidewalk past outdoor seating areas with purple neon-trimmed umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person sitting at outdoor table under large purple umbrella

entered.detail: fast food building with white tile facade, purple neon trim, and red signage
large purple patio umbrellas with green text shading outdoor tables
round metal tables with purple stools arranged along the walkway
tall empty metal billboard structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins along a covered restaurant walkway with distinctive white tile walls and purple neon accents. The camera moves past outdoor seating with large purple umbrellas where NPCs are seated at tables. The space is semi-sheltered by the building overhang, with futuristic city skyscrapers visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban parking lot with parked vehicles

events.description: turning right to navigate between parked cars in the lot
passing closely by the green van on the right side

agents.ego_description: crossing the asphalt parking lot and navigating between parked vehicles toward the intersection

entered.detail: dusty pink four-door sedan parked at the curb with visible wear
dark green boxy utility van with roof-mounted equipment and front brush guard

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the sheltered sidewalk into an open asphalt parking lot. It passes a dusty pink sedan and a dark green van while approaching a large empty billboard structure. The area is exposed to bright sunlight with no pedestrian activity, focusing on navigation between parked vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection approach with fuel station signage

events.description: turning left to align with the crosswalk direction
approaching intersection corner where a pedestrian waits to cross

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection while approaching a woman standing at the crosswalk corner

notable_agents.action: woman in purple shorts and red top waiting at the crosswalk corner with arms crossed

entered.detail: large elevated commercial sign with green neon CHOOH2 text displaying fuel prices
green and yellow gas station roof structure with supporting columns
tall pole with traffic signals and orange accent lamps at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a major intersection dominated by a large CHOOH2 fuel sign and a green gas station canopy. The large billboard from earlier is now on the left. A woman in distinctive purple shorts waits at the corner as the camera aligns with the crosswalk. The area is open with scattered pedestrians and light vehicle traffic.

events.description: crossing the street alongside other pedestrians while vehicles pass by
turning slightly right toward the gas station sidewalk after crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection following the woman in purple shorts, then continuing toward the gas station

notable_agents.action: woman in purple shorts crossing the street ahead of ego
blue sedan driving through the intersection perpendicular to the crosswalk

entered.detail: fuel pumps under the green canopy with illuminated price displays
concrete and wood public bench at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the intersection at the crosswalk, following the woman in purple shorts while a blue sedan passes through the intersection. After crossing, the camera turns toward the gas station, bringing the fuel pumps and canopy into close view. The CHOOH2 sign is now prominently visible overhead as the segment ends near the gas station entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit restaurant walkway into a bright, open urban intersection and toward a futuristic gas station. It begins along a white-tiled sidewalk under a building overhang, passing purple umbrellas and seated patrons with skyscrapers looming in the distance. As the camera leaves the shelter, the scene opens into a sun-drenched asphalt parking lot, navigating past a dusty pink sedan and a dark green van toward a large empty billboard. The perspective then shifts toward a major intersection dominated by a towering CHOOH2 fuel sign, where the camera aligns with a woman in purple shorts waiting at the crosswalk. Finally, the camera crosses the street behind her as a blue sedan passes by, turning toward the gas station to bring the fuel pumps and overhead canopy into close view.
